description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a light gray fabric, featuring three large back cushions and two seat cushions. The sofa is accessorized with four decorative throw pillows, each with distinct geometric and patterned designs in neutral tones. The armrests are wide, straight, and padded, with a subtle trim detail that adds a touch of contrast and sophistication. The base of the sofa is low and blocky, with short, recessed legs that are barely visible, giving the piece a grounded and sturdy appearance. The back of the sofa is plain and fully upholstered, maintaining a clean and minimalist look. Overall, the sofa exudes a contemporary urban style suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban environments.
description: A contemporary light gray sofa with wide padded armrests, three back cushions, two seat cushions, and four decorative throw pillows. The design is modern and minimal, with subtle trim and a sturdy, low-profile base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, three back cushions, two seat cushions, and four decorative pillows with patterned covers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the armrest, and the angled back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, fully upholstered back and the sofa's low, blocky base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement, emphasizing the sofa's symmetrical design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, loose back cushions and two large, loose seat cushions; four smaller, varied throw pillows placed symmetrically.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, straight, padded armrests at seat height with subtle trim detail and a boxy profile.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs recessed under the base, likely made of dark wood or plastic, minimally visible from the front and sides.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three segmented, loose cushions; no visible tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture; throw pillows feature geometric and patterned designs in neutral tones.
